cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the author did when he met Mr. Lee. The passage starts with the author recounting a memory from when he was ten. He was walking with his mother, and she stopped to talk to Mr. Lee. The author mentions that he knew he could see Mr. Lee anytime around the neighborhood, so he didn't pay any attention to him. Then after passing Mr. Lee, his mother gave him a lesson about always speaking to people. So the key point here is that the author didn't pay attention to Mr. Lee when they met. The options are (A) talked with somebody else, (B) attracted by a dog, (C) greeted him politely, (D) ignored him. The passage says the author didn't pay any attention
